title: Securing the AI Agent: A Unified Framework for Multi-Layer Agent Red Teaming
innovation_summary: Securing the AI Agent: A Unified Framework for Multi-Layer Agent Red Teaming: We present AI-Infra-Guard, an open-source framework that organizes AI red teaming around a single observation: the attack surface of an AI agent is stratified across layers.
